title: msptc: A configuration-driven simulation core for molten-salt parabolic-trough CSP
description: Configuration-driven Python simulation core for parabolic-trough concentrating solar power with molten salt: analytical error-cone optics, Forristall HCE thermodynamics, collector loop, thermal storage and power block, altitude-dependent air properties, freeze protection, exergy, and techno-economic and market-value analysis.
